response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering discipline and has shipped complex systems, he lacks the core specialization this role requires. His 15-year career has focused on full-stack web development, backend services, and developer tooling rather than JVM internals or IDE development. Java and Kotlin appear only as secondary skills in brief roles at National Instruments and Altom (2014–2018); there is no evidence of deep JVM expertise, Spring ecosystem experience, or any IDE tooling background. The position specifically seeks a JVM and enterprise framework expert, not a generalist capable of learning these domains.
strengths: Exceptional software craftsmanship: strong TDD discipline, clean architecture, and code quality focus across entire career
Proven ability to architect and ship complex systems: designed distributed GIS platforms, extensible test runners, and high-throughput data systems handling millions of requests
Recent developer tooling experience: contributed to MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure at Naver, showing emerging interest in developer tools
concerns: No demonstrated JVM or Java/Kotlin specialization: languages listed in skills but no substantive project experience shown; appeared only briefly in 2014–2018 roles without detail
No IDE internals or language tooling background: career trajectory is web, mobile, and backend services with zero evidence of IDE development, language servers, or IDE internals work
No enterprise framework or application server experience: zero mention of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, Maven/Gradle, or application server integration—all central to the role

key_factors.factor: No IDE development or language tooling background
Strong general software engineering discipline and delivery track record
